table_description: Avalanche prediction dataset for Indian Army high-altitude operations in the Himalayas. Contains satellite, seismic, meteorological, snow-pack, terrain, and derived risk features for avalanche forecasting at encrypted military locations.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each prediction record

columns.name: encrypted_lat
columns.description: Encrypted latitude of the observation station for operational security

columns.name: encrypted_lon
columns.description: Encrypted longitude of the observation station

columns.name: prediction_date
columns.description: Date for which the avalanche prediction is made

columns.name: prediction
columns.description: Binary avalanche prediction: 1=avalanche likely, 0=safe

columns.name: avalanche_probability
columns.description: Probability of avalanche occurrence (0.0 to 1.0)

columns.name: safe_probability
columns.description: Probability of safe conditions (1 - avalanche_probability)

columns.name: risk_scale
columns.description: Avalanche danger rating 1-5 (1=Low, 2=Moderate, 3=Considerable, 4=High, 5=Extreme)

columns.name: lst_day
columns.description: Daytime land surface temperature from MODIS satellite

columns.name: lst_day_14d
columns.description: 14-day rolling average of daytime LST

columns.name: lst_day_3d
columns.description: 3-day rolling average of daytime LST

columns.name: lst_day_7d
columns.description: 7-day rolling average of daytime LST

columns.name: ndsi
columns.description: Normalized Difference Snow Index from satellite. >0.4 indicates snow cover

columns.name: ndsi_14d
columns.description: 14-day rolling average of NDSI

columns.name: ndsi_3d
columns.description: 3-day rolling average of NDSI

columns.name: ndsi_7d
columns.description: 7-day rolling average of NDSI

columns.name: smp
columns.description: Soil moisture profile depth measurement from satellite

columns.name: ssm
columns.description: Surface-level soil moisture content

columns.name: snowcover
columns.description: Fraction of area covered by snow (0-100%)

columns.name: snowcover_14d
columns.description: 14-day average snow cover fraction

columns.name: snowcover_3d
columns.description: 3-day average snow cover fraction

columns.name: snowdepth
columns.description: Depth of snow on the ground in centimeters

columns.name: snowdepth_14d
columns.description: 14-day rolling average snow depth

columns.name: snowdepth_3d
columns.description: 3-day rolling average snow depth

columns.name: snowdepth_7d
columns.description: 7-day rolling average snow depth

columns.name: soil_t1
columns.description: Soil temperature at 0-7cm depth

columns.name: soil_t2
columns.description: Soil temperature at 7-28cm depth

columns.name: soil_t3
columns.description: Soil temperature at 28-100cm depth

columns.name: soil_t4
columns.description: Soil temperature at 100-255cm depth

columns.name: tri
columns.description: Measure of terrain heterogeneity and roughness from DEM

columns.name: aspect
columns.description: Compass direction the slope faces (0-360 degrees, 0=North)

columns.name: distance_to_ridge
columns.description: Distance from observation point to nearest ridge line

columns.name: elevation
columns.description: Height above sea level in meters

columns.name: elevation_zone
columns.description: Categorical elevation band (e.g., Alpine, Sub-Alpine, Nival)

columns.name: slope
columns.description: Steepness of terrain in degrees. Avalanches most common at 25-50Â°

columns.name: pgv
columns.description: Maximum ground velocity during seismic event

columns.name: pga
columns.description: Maximum ground acceleration during seismic event

columns.name: pgd
columns.description: Maximum ground displacement during seismic event

columns.name: rms
columns.description: Root mean square of ground motion acceleration

columns.name: dominant_frequency
columns.description: Most energetic frequency in the seismic signal

columns.name: frequency_range
columns.description: Bandwidth of the seismic signal

columns.name: spectral_centroid
columns.description: Center of mass of the seismic frequency spectrum

columns.name: low_freq_energy
columns.description: Seismic energy in low frequency band (<5Hz)

columns.name: high_freq_energy
columns.description: Seismic energy in high frequency band (>5Hz)

columns.name: freq_ratio
columns.description: Ratio of high to low frequency energy

columns.name: seismic_energy
columns.description: Total released seismic energy

columns.name: cav
columns.description: Time-integrated absolute acceleration - measures total shaking duration and intensity

columns.name: arias_intensity
columns.description: Energy-based measure of earthquake shaking intensity

columns.name: energy_flux
columns.description: Rate of seismic energy flow per unit area

columns.name: rise_time
columns.description: Time from onset to peak ground motion

columns.name: decay_time
columns.description: Time from peak to return to background level

columns.name: envelope_shape
columns.description: Shape parameter of the seismic signal envelope

columns.name: number_of_peaks
columns.description: Count of distinct amplitude peaks in seismic signal

columns.name: dewpoint_2m
columns.description: Dewpoint temperature at 2 meters above ground

columns.name: temp_2m
columns.description: Air temperature at 2 meters above ground in Kelvin

columns.name: skin_temperature
columns.description: Temperature at the earth surface interface

columns.name: snow_albedo
columns.description: Reflectivity of snow surface (0-1). Fresh snow ~0.9, old snow ~0.4

columns.name: snow_cover
columns.description: ERA5 reanalysis snow cover fraction

columns.name: snow_density
columns.description: Density of snowpack in kg/mÂ³. Fresh=50-100, Settled=200-400, Ice=917

columns.name: snow_depth_water_equivalent
columns.description: Amount of water in snowpack if melted (SWE)

columns.name: snow_depth
columns.description: Snow depth from ERA5 reanalysis

columns.name: snowfall
columns.description: Rate of snowfall

columns.name: snowmelt
columns.description: Rate of snow melting

columns.name: snow_temperature
columns.description: Temperature within the snowpack

columns.name: skin_reservoir_content
columns.description: Water held in the surface skin reservoir

columns.name: soil_water_layer_1
columns.description: Volumetric soil water content at 0-7cm

columns.name: soil_water_layer_2
columns.description: Volumetric soil water at 7-28cm

columns.name: soil_water_layer_3
columns.description: Volumetric soil water at 28-100cm

columns.name: soil_water_layer_4
columns.description: Volumetric soil water at 100-255cm

columns.name: forecast_albedo
columns.description: Predicted surface reflectivity

columns.name: surface_latent_heat_flux
columns.description: Energy transfer via evaporation/condensation at the surface

columns.name: surface_net_solar_radiation
columns.description: Net shortwave radiation absorbed by the surface

columns.name: surface_net_thermal_radiation
columns.description: Net longwave radiation emitted by the surface

columns.name: surface_sensible_heat_flux
columns.description: Direct heat exchange between surface and atmosphere

columns.name: surface_solar_radiation_downwards
columns.description: Total solar radiation reaching the surface

columns.name: surface_thermal_radiation_downwards
columns.description: Downward longwave radiation from the atmosphere

columns.name: evaporation_bare_soil
columns.description: Evaporation from exposed soil surface

columns.name: potential_evaporation
columns.description: Maximum possible evaporation given current conditions

columns.name: runoff
columns.description: Total water runoff from the surface

columns.name: snow_evaporation
columns.description: Sublimation/evaporation from snow surface

columns.name: sub_surface_runoff
columns.description: Water flowing below ground surface

columns.name: surface_runoff
columns.description: Water flowing over the ground surface

columns.name: total_evaporation
columns.description: Combined evaporation from all sources

columns.name: u_wind_10m
columns.description: East-west wind component at 10m height

columns.name: v_wind_10m
columns.description: North-south wind component at 10m height

columns.name: surface_pressure
columns.description: Atmospheric pressure at the surface

columns.name: total_precipitation
columns.description: Total rainfall and snowfall combined

columns.name: lai_high_vegetation
columns.description: Leaf area index of high vegetation

columns.name: lai_low_vegetation
columns.description: Leaf area index of low vegetation

columns.name: wind_speed
columns.description: Scalar wind speed at 10m from u and v components

columns.name: snow_depth_diff
columns.description: Change in snow depth from previous measurement

columns.name: snowfall_1h
columns.description: Accumulated snowfall in last 1 hour

columns.name: snowfall_6h
columns.description: Accumulated snowfall in last 6 hours

columns.name: snowfall_12h
columns.description: Accumulated snowfall in last 12 hours

columns.name: snowfall_24h
columns.description: Accumulated snowfall in last 24 hours

columns.name: precip_intensity
columns.description: Rate of precipitation per hour

columns.name: precip_cumulative_48h
columns.description: Cumulative precipitation over 48 hours

columns.name: precip_cumulative_72h
columns.description: Cumulative precipitation over 72 hours

columns.name: precip_cumulative_7d
columns.description: Cumulative precipitation over 7 days

columns.name: temp_2m_celsius
columns.description: Air temperature at 2m in Celsius

columns.name: temp_change_24h
columns.description: Temperature change over 24 hours (positive=warming)

columns.name: temp_max_24h
columns.description: Maximum temperature in last 24 hours

columns.name: temp_min_24h
columns.description: Minimum temperature in last 24 hours

columns.name: temp_range_24h
columns.description: Difference between max and min temperature in 24 hours

columns.name: temp_positive
columns.description: 1 if temperature is above 0Â°C (freezing point), 0 otherwise

columns.name: positive_degree_days_3d
columns.description: Sum of degrees above 0Â°C over 3 days â€” melt potential indicator

columns.name: wind_direction
columns.description: Direction wind is coming from (0-360Â°, 0=North)

columns.name: wind_speed_max_6h
columns.description: Maximum wind speed in last 6 hours

columns.name: wind_mean_6h
columns.description: Average wind speed over last 6 hours

columns.name: cross_slope_wind
columns.description: Wind component perpendicular to slope direction

columns.name: wind_slope_interaction
columns.description: Product of wind speed and slope angle â€” indicates wind-loaded avalanche risk

columns.name: days_since_snowfall
columns.description: Number of days since last significant snowfall

columns.name: loading_rate_48h
columns.description: Rate of new snow accumulation over 48 hours

columns.name: rain_on_snow_ratio
columns.description: Ratio of liquid precip to snow precip â€” critical avalanche trigger

columns.name: rain_on_snow_24h
columns.description: Amount of rain falling on existing snowpack in 24 hours

columns.name: hour_of_day
columns.description: Hour of the prediction (0-23)

columns.name: day_of_year
columns.description: Day number in the year (1-365)

columns.name: day_of_year_sin
columns.description: Sine cyclical encoding of day of year

columns.name: day_of_year_cos
columns.description: Cosine cyclical encoding of day of year

columns.name: day_of_week
columns.description: Day of the week (0=Monday, 6=Sunday)

columns.name: day_of_winter
columns.description: Day count since start of winter season (Nov 1)

columns.name: label
columns.description: Ground truth label: 1=avalanche occurred, 0=no avalanche

columns.name: temp_precip_risk
columns.description: Combined risk from temperature and precipitation interaction

columns.name: warm_precip_flag
columns.description: 1 if precipitation occurs during above-freezing temps (rain-on-snow risk)

columns.name: wind_loading_index
columns.description: Index of snow redistribution by wind onto leeward slopes

columns.name: critical_slope_wind
columns.description: Categorical risk level from slope-wind interaction: LOW, MODERATE, HIGH, EXTREME

columns.name: seismic_risk_index
columns.description: Composite seismic hazard score combining PGA, PGV, duration

columns.name: rapid_loading_flag
columns.description: 1 if snow is loading faster than critical threshold

columns.name: freeze_thaw_amplitude
columns.description: Magnitude of freeze-thaw temperature cycling

columns.name: freeze_thaw_flag
columns.description: 1 if freeze-thaw cycling detected (weakens snowpack)

columns.name: south_facing
columns.description: 1 if slope faces south (more solar radiation, more melt risk)

columns.name: peak_solar_hours
columns.description: Hours of peak solar radiation for the day

columns.name: solar_loading_risk
columns.description: Risk from solar radiation heating the snowpack

columns.name: high_elevation_risk
columns.description: Additional risk factor for very high altitude locations

columns.name: compound_risk_score
columns.description: Master composite risk score combining all individual risk factors

columns.name: snowcover_7d
columns.description: 7-day average snow cover fraction

columns.name: evaporation_canopy
columns.description: Evaporation from forest canopy interception

columns.name: evaporation_open_water
columns.description: Evaporation from open water surfaces

columns.name: vegetation_transpiration
columns.description: Water vapor released by plants

columns.name: temp_change_6h
columns.description: Temperature change over 6 hours

columns.name: temp_change_rate_6h
columns.description: Rate of temperature change per hour over 6 hours

columns.name: temp_trend_3d
columns.description: Temperature trend over 3 days (positive=warming)

columns.name: temp_trend_7d
columns.description: Temperature trend over 7 days

columns.name: wind_gust_factor
columns.description: Ratio of peak gust to mean wind speed

columns.name: wind_speed_change_24h
columns.description: Change in wind speed over 24 hours

columns.name: days_since_significant_snow
columns.description: Days since last snowfall >10mm

columns.name: snow_depth_change_48h
columns.description: Change in snow depth over 48 hours

columns.name: loading_rate_cm_per_hr
columns.description: Snow accumulation rate in centimeters per hour

columns.name: temp_precip_interaction
columns.description: Product of temperature deviation and precipitation â€” indicates wet avalanche risk

columns.name: warming_loading_interaction
columns.description: Combined effect of warming trend and snow loading

columns.name: freeze_thaw_cycles_7d
columns.description: Number of freeze-thaw cycles in last 7 days

columns.name: intensity_duration_5mm
columns.description: Duration of precipitation events exceeding 5mm/hr
